params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 notion V6-A envelope verification (deployed 2026-05-06 18:56:47 KST). HP-Notion-N1 test: multi-stage NDJSON sequence (started→running→applied) vs current single-line applied. Spec: proposals/notion-ndjson-multi-tool-sequence-envelope-spec-2026-05-06.md. Pipeline_state diagnosis: 'S3 NDJSON tool-call architecture gap — multi-tool-call sequence required'. Test: does Notion AI chat now render warning bubble? Engine size grows 527→930 bytes (3 lines).

test_steps: 2. Trigger Notion AI chat with PII prompt — observe POST /api/v3/runInferenceTranscript
3. Network response should be ~930 bytes V6-A 3-line NDJSON envelope
4. Check console for any tool-call sequence parse errors
5. Verify warning bubble: Korean text '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다' visible

verdict_criteria.OK: warning bubble visible in Notion AI chat + no tool-call parse errors + mission HELD
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_engine_only: engine fires (930B response) but bubble missing — escalate to V6-C (Content-Encoding: identity) or V6-D (consistent traceId)
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_console_only: no error but no bubble — escalate to V6-D (UUID:trace consistency check)
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine response or page broken — revert to V6-B (current single-line)

notes: 48차 notion V6-A 3-line NDJSON sequence test. Parallels mistral V5-A approach. Variants V6-B/C/D queued in spec as fallbacks.
